name: Georgetown University
meets_full_need_notes: Georgetown does not guarantee meeting 100% of demonstrated financial need for all students, though it provides substantial need-based aid.
no_loan_notes: Loans are included in most Georgetown aid packages. No universal no-loan institutional policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: Limited merit scholarships available, including Georgetown Scholarship Program awards and school-specific awards. Most aid is need-based.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive need-based aid using same methodology as RD. Students may request release from ED agreement if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Georgetown accepts appeals for changed circumstances. Students submit documentation to Office of Student Financial Services.
